news.summary: Valcourt, Quebec, May 29, 2025 - BRP Inc. conducted its annual and special shareholder meeting today in a virtual setting. The event was live-streamed and will soon be viewable on the company's website. BRP Inc. trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol DOO and on the NASDAQ as DOOO. Stay tuned for more updates.
news.headline: BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOOO) held its annual meeting virtually on May 29, 2025. Meeting details recorded.

news.summary: In a recent update on May 29, 2025, Medallion Bank, an FDIC-insured institution, shared its plan to redeem all existing shares of its Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series F (Nasdaq: MBNKP) on July 1, 2025 (the “Redemption Date”). The redemption will be executed at a set price of $25.00 per share (the “Redemption Price”). Medallion Bank is known for providing consumer loans for recreational vehicles, boats, and home improvements, as well as offering loan origination services to fintech partners.
news.headline: Medallion Bank to redeem all Series F Preferred Stock shares on July 1, 2025 for $25.00 each.

news.summary: In comparison to the previous year, there was a 2% rise in net sales, along with a corresponding increase of 2% in comparable sales, marking the 9th straight quarter of advancing market share. The operating margin showed significant progress, reaching 7.5%, which represented a surge of 140 basis points from the prior year. Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments also saw positive growth, reaching $2.2 billion, a 28% increase from the previous year. This information was disclosed from San Francisco.
news.headline: Gap Inc. reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results: Net sales up 2%, comp sales up 2%, operating margin improves to 7.5%, $2.2B in cash.
GAP 1Q GROSS MARGIN 41.8%, EST. 41.6%
GAP 1Q EPS 51C, EST. 45C

news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a prominent figure in agentic automation, shared its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 which concluded on April 30, 2025. The company reported an Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) of $1.693 billion, demonstrating a 12% increase compared to the previous year. Daniel Dines, the Founder and CEO of UiPath, expressed contentment with the results, attributing the growth to enhanced operational efficiency and the substantial return on investment that customers are experiencing with their automation platform.
news.headline: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) Q1 fiscal 2026 results show ARR of $1.693 billion, up 12% YoY. CEO Daniel Dines pleased with improved execution.
AMERICAN EAGLE 1Q NET REV. $1.09B, EST. $1.1B
AMERICAN EAGLE OUTFITTERS REPORTS RESULTS

news.summary: In Westlake, Texas on May 29, 2025, DealerFire, a prominent provider of tailor-made automotive dealership websites and digital marketing solutions, is sharing essential advice with its dealership partners to enhance website user experience (UX). In an era where car buyers increasingly depend on digital platforms, DealerFire aims to assist its clients in maximizing usability and engagement.
news.headline: DealerFire in Texas advises dealerships on enhancing user experience to keep customers; key for car buyers today.
HASSETT: EXPECT TRADE DEALS IN NEXT WEEK OR TWO
WH SR. ADVISER HASSETT: EXPECT TRADE DEALS IN NEXT WEEK OR TWO  HAVE BEEN BRIEFED ON THREE THAT ARE ABOUT TO HAPPEN
HASSETT: HAD PRODUCTIVE TALKS WITH INDIA
Rush Enterprises boosts stock buyback plan by $50M.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, RBB Bancorp, along with its subsidiaries Royal Business Bank and RBB Asset Management Company, collectively known as the Company, revealed a new development. The Company's Board of Directors approved a stock repurchase program allowing for the repurchase of $18 million worth of the Company's common stock. This initiative is set to take place by June 30, 2026.
news.headline: RBB Bancorp authorizes $18 million stock repurchase plan for up to June 30, 2026.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Annexon, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANNX), a biopharmaceutical company, shared news of their participation in the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference. Douglas Love, the company's president and CEO, is set to present on June 4, 2025, at 8:10 a.m. EST. Annexon focuses on developing advanced clinical therapies for individuals battling serious classical complement-mediated neuroinflammatory ailments impacting the body, brain, and eyes.
news.headline: Annexon Biosciences (Nasdaq: ANNX) to present at Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 4, 2025 at 8:10 a.m. EST.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, ChampionsGate Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: CHPGU), operating from Monterey, CA, successfully completed its initial public offering by closing 7,475,000 units at $10.00 per unit. This figure encompasses the complete use of the underwriter’s over-allotment option. The Company raised gross proceeds of $74.75 million from the offering, prior to deductions for underwriting discounts and estimated offering expenses. Beginning May 28, 2025, the units became available for trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "CHPGU".
news.headline: ChampionsGate Acquisition Corp closes $74.75M IPO with 7,475,000 units sold at $10 per unit on Nasdaq as "CHPGU."

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Latham Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWIM), which is recognized as the leading designer, producer, and promoter of in-ground residential swimming pools in North America, Australia, and New Zealand, disclosed its participation in upcoming investor conferences.
news.headline: Latham Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWIM) to attend investor conferences in June 2025, largest pool manufacturer in N. America, Aust., and NZ.

news.summary: Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) recently revealed the successful conclusion of the I-80/Gilman Street Interchange Improvement Project in Berkeley, California. The accomplishment was commemorated with a ribbon-cutting event on April 28, organized by the Alameda County Transportation Commission and the California Department of Transportation. This milestone signifies the delivery of vital mobility upgrades to the East Bay region, benefiting numerous residents and commuters.
news.headline: Parsons completes I-80/Gilman Street Interchange Project in Berkeley, California, celebrating the achievement with a ribbon-cutting ceremony.

news.summary: Color Star Technology Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: ADD), a leading entertainment technology company based in New York, achieved a key milestone today in its new venture into cryptocurrency mining. The company, known for its expertise in integrating artificial intelligence and technology into the entertainment sector, is making waves in the cryptocurrency industry. This development marks a substantial step forward for Color Star as it expands its business operations.
news.headline: Color Star Technology Co., Ltd. hits milestone in cryptocurrency mining business, integrates AI tech. Nasdaq: ADD.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Lovesac Company (Nasdaq: LOVE), a renowned home and technology brand, revealed that they will disclose their first-quarter financial outcomes on June 12, 2025, before markets open. To delve into the specifics, a conference call has been scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to analyze the financial details in-depth.
news.headline: Lovesac's Q1 results will be released on June 12, 2025; conference call at 8:30 am EST.

news.summary: Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) disclosed that Michael Benstock and Mike Koempel will be engaged in a fireside chat at the Noble Capital Markets 2025 Emerging Growth Virtual Equity Conference on June 5, 2025, at 10:30 AM ET. The event can be accessed by registering for free via the provided link. A video replay of the presentation will be accessible on the company's Investor Relations website post-event. Additionally, virtual meetings will be held by management throughout the day for interested parties.
news.headline: Superior Group of Companies (NASDAQ: SGC) to participate in Noble Capital Markets 2025 Emerging Growth Virtual Equity Conference on June 5, 2025 at 10:30 AM ET. Attendees can register for free.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMRX) announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences. The Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference is scheduled for June 5, 2025, with the company presentation at 9:20 AM ET. Following that, the Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference will take place on June 10, 2025, featuring a fireside chat at 10:40 AM ET. The attendees from Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. will include Chirag Patel, Co-Chief Executive Officer and President, and Tasos Konidaris, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, at both conferences. Those interested can access the live webcast at https://investors.amneal.com, and replays will be available after each event.
news.headline: Amneal (AMRX) participating in two investor conferences. June 5 - Jefferies Conf at 9:20AM ET, June 10 - Goldman Sachs Conf at 10:40AM ET. Speakers: Co-CEO, President Chirag Patel and EVP, CFO Tasos Konidaris. Webcast at https://investors.amneal.com.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, AGM Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AGMH), a tech company focused on high-performance hardware, declared a consolidation of its ordinary shares, with 50 pre-Consolidation Shares merging into one post-Consolidation Share. This change will take effect from June 3, 2025, when the Company's ordinary shares will start trading on a post-Consolidation basis.
news.headline: AGM Group Holdings Inc. consolidates 50 pre-Consolidation shares into 1 post-Consolidation share, effective June 3, 2025.
Fed's Daly: Fed policy in a good place. The US economy is in a good place.
Fed's Daly: Bond yields show the markets are trying to process uncertainty about policy and the economy.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, NextCure, Inc. (Nasdaq: NXTC) and LigaChem Biosciences, Inc. revealed that they would be showcasing a trial in progress poster at the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The poster will focus on the Phase 1 study of LNCB74, an antibody-drug conjugate targeting B7-H4. NextCure, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapies for cancer treatment. This collaboration with LigaChem Biosciences, Inc. demonstrates their commitment to advancing groundbreaking treatment options. The presentation at ASCO aims to provide insights from the ongoing study, offering potential advancements in cancer care.
news.headline: NextCure and LigaChemBio will present trial data for LNCB74, a B7-H4 targeted ADC, in ASCO 2025.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in South San Francisco, Vaxart, Inc. (NASDAQ: VXRT), a clinical-stage biotech company, stated that its management team will engage in a fireside chat at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 5, 2025, at 2:00 PM ET. Vaxart is known for developing oral recombinant pill vaccines using its unique delivery platform. This participation signifies the company's commitment to engaging with stakeholders and showcasing its progress in the industry. This event will provide insight into Vaxart's advancements during a crucial time for the healthcare sector.
news.headline: Vaxart (NASDAQ: VXRT) to join Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 5, 2025 at 2:00 PM ET.

news.summary: Today, the stock market started strong but saw a quick decline despite a special court ruling that most of Trump's tariffs were illegal. Notably, Nvidia experienced a breakout. The stock market indexes showed signs of improvement after a meeting between Trump and Powell. Nvidia surged past its entry point, while IPOs showed a mixed performance.
news.headline: Stock market gains post Trump-Powell meet, Nvidia surges, IPOs mixed despite court ruling most Trump tariffs as illegal.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on May 29, 2025, Relay Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: RLAY) disclosed its involvement in two fireside chats scheduled for June. The company, a clinical-stage precision medicine firm revolutionizing drug discovery through a fusion of cutting-edge computational and experimental methods, shared this key update.
news.headline: Relay Therapeutics (Nasdaq: RLAY) to join two June investor conferences for fireside chats.

news.summary: On Thursday, the cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a downturn due to an ongoing legal battle concerning the tariffs introduced by President Donald Trump, impacting risk appetite among investors. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $105,927, down by 1.4%; Ethereum at $2,643, up by 0.2%; Solana at $166.83, dropping by 1.9%; XRP at $2.26, with a 0.7% increase; Dogecoin at $0.2165, down 1.0%; and Shiba Inu at $0.00001402, a marginal decline of 0.1%. Noteworthy statistics reveal a 14% rise in large transaction volumes and a 13% increase in daily active addresses according to IntoTheBlock. Coinglass data highlights that $344 million worth of assets led to the liquidation of 97,984 traders in the previous 24 hours. Michael Saylor's insights on the matter can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market down due to tariff news; Bitcoin at $105,927 (-1.4%), Ethereum $2,643 (+0.2%), XRP $2.26 (+0.7%), Dogecoin $0.2165 (-1.0%). Transaction volume up by 14%, 97,984 traders liquidated in last 24 hours, losing $344 million.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Zscaler, Inc. revealed that Kevin Rubin has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer. Zscaler, a prominent cloud security company trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol ZS, made this decision to enhance its financial leadership. Rubin will be responsible for managing the company's worldwide finance department, contributing significantly to expanding operations to facilitate further growth and advancement.
news.headline: Kevin Rubin named CFO of Zscaler to spearhead growth. Key role in global finance, supporting company's expansion.

news.summary: In Princeton, New Jersey, on May 29, 2025, Digital Asset Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: DAAQU) disclosed information regarding the initial public offering of 17,250,000 units, including 2,250,000 units from the underwriters exercising their overallotment option in full, that was finalized on April 30, 2025. Those who purchased these units now have the option to individually trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units starting around June 2, 2025. The remaining units will still be traded on The Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “DAAQU,” while the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded separately under the symbols “DAAQ” and “DAAQW,” respectively. It's important to note that only whole warrants, not fractional warrants, will be issued upon separation, and holders of units must contact Efficiency, the Company’s transfer agent at dwacrequests@useefficiency.com, through their brokers to carry out the separation process.
news.headline: Digital Asset Acquisition Corp. will allow separate trading of Class A shares and warrants from 17,250,000 units IPO on June 2, 2025.

news.summary: Real Asset Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: RAAQU) recently announced that holders of 17,250,000 units from the Company’s initial public offering, which took place on April 30, 2025, now have the option to separately trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants included in the units starting from June 2, 2025. This offering also included 2,250,000 units issued through the underwriters exercising their overallotment option in full. The units not separated will still be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “RAAQU,” while the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded separately under the symbols “RAAQ” and “RAAQW,” respectively. It's important to note that only whole warrants will be traded as no fractional warrants will be issued during the separation process. To separate the units into Class A ordinary shares and warrants, holders will need to have their brokers reach out to Efficiency, the Company’s transfer agent, at dwacrequests@useefficiency.com.
news.headline: Real Asset Acquisition Corp. to offer separate trading of Class A shares and warrants from June 2, 2025 onwards after IPO of 17.25M units.

news.summary: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed on May 29, 2025, their plans to present at two significant upcoming events. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed on Nasdaq as FULC, is dedicated to creating small molecules that enhance the well-being of individuals with rare genetic illnesses. The presentations are scheduled for the 5th Global Congress on Sickle Cell Disease and the 2025 European Hematology Association Congress. These events serve as crucial platforms for sharing advancements and insights in the field, reaching a wide audience. Fulcrum's participation underscores their commitment to advancing treatment options for those affected by these conditions.
news.headline: Fulcrum Therapeutics to present at upcoming medical meetings on Sickle Cell Disease and European Hematology Congress in 2025.

news.summary: In the city of Tempe, Arizona, Matt Adrian, a former dental lender, has recently become a Practice Advisor at Menlo Dental Transitions. This move comes following a prosperous career in dental lending.
news.headline: Matt Adrian, former lender, joins Menlo Dental Transitions in Southeast as Practice Advisor.
WH Sr. Adviser Hassett concludes comments on Fox News

news.summary: Sonder Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SOND) based in San Francisco revealed it recently received a notification from Nasdaq on May 23, 2025. The notice highlighted the company's non-compliance with the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the delay in submitting its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the recent quarter. As a result, Sonder is currently addressing this deficiency to meet Nasdaq's regulations and ensure adherence to listing requirements. The company's stock ticker is SOND on the Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.headline: Sonder Holdings Inc. notified by Nasdaq for delayed filing of Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q, violating Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).

news.summary: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) revealed its financial outcomes for Q4 and the full fiscal year concluding on April 30, 2025. Q4 Fiscal 2025 displayed notable figures: total revenue reached $388 million, marking a 16% rise compared to the prior year, both as reported and in constant currency. Elastic Cloud revenue was notably up by 23% year-over-year, totaling $182 million, as reported and in constant currency. Furthermore, the GAAP operating loss stood at $12 million.
news.headline: Elastic reports strong Q4 & Fiscal 2025 results with total revenue of $388 million, Elastic Cloud revenue of $182 million. GAAP operating loss at $12 million.

news.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) has released its financial outcomes for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, indicating promising statistics. The company recorded a first-quarter revenue of $23.4 billion, representing a 5% increase compared to the previous year. Moreover, first-quarter operating income saw significant growth, reaching $1.2 billion, a remarkable 21% surge year over year. The non-GAAP operating income also demonstrated a positive trend, standing at $1.7 billion, marking a 10% increase. The first-quarter diluted EPS amounted to $1.37, maintaining stability compared to the previous year. Dell Technologies additionally provided guidance for the fiscal 2026 second quarter and full year, indicating a positive outlook for the future.
news.headline: Dell Technologies reports Q1 revenue of $23.4B, operating income of $1.2B, and diluted EPS of $1.37. Expectations for Q2 and full year shared.
Zscaler announces Q3 fiscal 2025 financial results.

news.summary: In the first quarter, revenue experienced a 5.91% year-over-year growth, reaching $26.7 million. By the end of the quarter, the company held $30.7 million in cash and cash equivalents. Meanwhile, operations in New York are advancing steadily, particularly as the Buffalo cultivation facility approaches its completion stage.
news.headline: FLUENT's Q1 revenue up 5.91% YoY to $26.7M, $30.7M cash on hand. NY operations progressing, Buffalo facility nears completion.

news.summary: Ambarella, Inc., a semiconductor company specializing in edge AI, revealed its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 concluding on April 30, 2025. The announcement was made in Santa Clara, California, on May 29, 2025. Ambarella, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AMBA.
news.headline: Ambarella, Inc. reports first quarter fiscal 2026 results for the period ended April 30, 2025. SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 29, 2025.
